name: antigravity-token-monitor
description: Monitor Antigravity session token usage and review session activity in a dashboard.

commands.title: Antigravity Token Monitor: Export Sessions Now

antigravity-token-monitor.sessionRoot.description: Override the Antigravity session root. Leave empty to use ~/.gemini/antigravity.

antigravity-token-monitor.debug.description: Show verbose debug logs in the Antigravity Token Monitor output channel.

antigravity-token-monitor.pollIntervalMs.description: How often the extension rescans sessions and recalculates usage.

antigravity-token-monitor.historyLimit.description: How many snapshots to keep per session.

antigravity-token-monitor.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size to read during token estimation heuristics.

antigravity-token-monitor.useRpcExport.description: When enabled, try exporting Antigravity conversations through the internal RPC into local JSONL artifacts before parsing token usage.

antigravity-token-monitor.exportStepsJso.description: When enabled, also export conversation steps into steps.jsonl. This is optional and mainly useful for debugging or transcript inspection.

antigravity-token-monitor.rpcExportInter.description: How often the extension exports Antigravity sessions into background JSONL artifacts when RPC export is enabled.

antigravity-token-monitor.rpcTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for internal Antigravity RPC requests used during JSONL artifact export.
